Package space.sunqian.fs.data.json

Interface JsonData

All Superinterfaces:
ByteData, CharData
public interface JsonData extends ByteData, CharData
The interface represents JSON data.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default @Nonnull BigDecimal
    asBigDecimal()
    Returns a BigDecimal value parsed from the current JSON data if the type of the current JSON data is JSON number.
    boolean
    asBoolean()
    Returns a boolean value parsed from the current JSON data if the type of the current JSON data is JSON boolean.
    default @Nonnull DataList
    asDataList()
    Returns a DataList with the ObjectConverter.defaultConverter() to wrap the asList() if the type of the current JSON data is JSON array.
    default @Nonnull DataMap
    asDataMap()
    Returns a DataMap with the ObjectConverter.defaultConverter() to wrap the asMap() if the type of the current JSON data is JSON object.
    default double
    asDouble()
    Returns a double value parsed from the current JSON data if the type of the current JSON data is JSON number.
    default float
    asFloat()
    Returns a float value parsed from the current JSON data if the type of the current JSON data is JSON number.
    default int
    asInt()
    Returns an int value parsed from the current JSON data if the type of the current JSON data is JSON number.
    @Nonnull List<Object>
    asList()
    Returns a list parsed from the current JSON data if the type of the current JSON data is JSON array.
    default long
    asLong()
    Returns a long value parsed from the current JSON data if the type of the current JSON data is JSON number.
    @Nonnull Map<String,Object>
    asMap()
    Returns a map parsed from the current JSON data if the type of the current JSON data is JSON object.
    @Nonnull Number
    asNumber()
    Returns a Number value parsed from the current JSON data if the type of the current JSON data is JSON number.
    @Nonnull String
    asString()
    Returns the string parsed from the current JSON data if the type of the current JSON data is JSON string.
    default boolean
    isNull()
    Returns true if the current JSON data is JSON null.
    static @Nonnull JsonData
    ofArray(@Nullable Object @Nonnull @RetainedParam ... array)
    Returns a JsonData represents a JSON array whose value is the given array.
    static @Nonnull JsonData
    ofBoolean(boolean bool)
    Returns a JsonData represents a JSON boolean whose value is the given boolean.
    static @Nonnull JsonData
    ofList(@Nonnull @RetainedParam List<@Nullable Object> array)
    Returns a JsonData represents a JSON array whose value is the given list.
    static @Nonnull JsonData
    ofMap(@Nonnull @RetainedParam Map<@Nonnull String,@Nullable Object> map)
    Returns a JsonData represents a JSON object whose value is the given map.
    static @Nonnull JsonData
    ofNull()
    Returns a JsonData represents JSON null.
    static @Nonnull JsonData
    ofNumber(@Nonnull Number number)
    Returns a JsonData represents a JSON number whose value is the given number.
    static @Nonnull JsonData
    ofString(@Nonnull String string)
    Returns a JsonData represents a JSON string whose value is the given string.
    default <T> T
    toObject(Class<T> cls)
    Converts this JsonData to a new object of the specified class.
    default @Nonnull Object
    toObject(Type type)
    Converts this JsonData to a new object of the specified type.
    default <T> T
    toObject(TypeRef<T> typeRef)
    Converts this JsonData to a new object of the specified class.
    @Nonnull String
    toString()
    Returns the JSON string of the current JSON data.
    @Nonnull JsonType
    type()
    Returns the type of the current JSON data.

  • Method Details

    • ofNull

      @Nonnull static @Nonnull JsonData ofNull()
      Returns a JsonData represents JSON null.
      Returns:
      a JsonData represents JSON null

    • ofString

      @Nonnull static @Nonnull JsonData ofString(@Nonnull @Nonnull String string)
      Returns a JsonData represents a JSON string whose value is the given string.
      Parameters:
      string - the given JSON string
      Returns:
      a JsonData represents a JSON string whose value is the given string

    • ofNumber

      @Nonnull static @Nonnull JsonData ofNumber(@Nonnull @Nonnull Number number)
      Returns a JsonData represents a JSON number whose value is the given number.
      Parameters:
      number - the given JSON number
      Returns:
      a JsonData represents a JSON number whose value is the given number

    • ofBoolean

      @Nonnull static @Nonnull JsonData ofBoolean(boolean bool)
      Returns a JsonData represents a JSON boolean whose value is the given boolean.
      Parameters:
      bool - the given JSON boolean
      Returns:
      a JsonData represents a JSON boolean whose value is the given boolean

    • ofMap

      @Nonnull static @Nonnull JsonData ofMap(@Nonnull @RetainedParam @Nonnull @RetainedParam Map<@Nonnull String,@Nullable Object> map)
      Returns a JsonData represents a JSON object whose value is the given map.
      Parameters:
      map - the given map
      Returns:
      a JsonData represents a JSON object whose value is the given map

    • ofList

      @Nonnull static @Nonnull JsonData ofList(@Nonnull @RetainedParam @Nonnull @RetainedParam List<@Nullable Object> array)
      Returns a JsonData represents a JSON array whose value is the given list.
      Parameters:
      array - the given list
      Returns:
      a JsonData represents a JSON array whose value is the given list

    • ofArray

      @Nonnull static @Nonnull JsonData ofArray(@Nullable @Nullable Object @Nonnull @RetainedParam ... array)
      Returns a JsonData represents a JSON array whose value is the given array.
      Parameters:
      array - the given array
      Returns:
      a JsonData represents a JSON array whose value is the given array

    • type

      @Nonnull @Nonnull JsonType type()
      Returns the type of the current JSON data.
      Returns:
      the type of the current JSON data

    • isNull

      default boolean isNull()
      Returns true if the current JSON data is JSON null.
      Returns:
      true if the current JSON data is JSON null

    • asString

      @Nonnull @Nonnull String asString() throws JsonDataException
      Returns the string parsed from the current JSON data if the type of the current JSON data is JSON string.
      Returns:
      the string parsed from the current JSON data if the type of the current JSON data is JSON string
      Throws:
      JsonDataException - if the current JSON data is not a JSON string

    • asMap

      @Nonnull @Nonnull Map<String,Object> asMap() throws JsonDataException
      Returns a map parsed from the current JSON data if the type of the current JSON data is JSON object. Note the returned map is mutable.
      Returns:
      a map parsed from the current JSON data if the type of the current JSON data is JSON object
      Throws:
      JsonDataException - if the current JSON data is not a JSON object

    • asList

      @Nonnull @Nonnull List<Object> asList() throws JsonDataException
      Returns a list parsed from the current JSON data if the type of the current JSON data is JSON array. Note the returned list is mutable.
      Returns:
      a list parsed from the current JSON data if the type of the current JSON data is JSON array
      Throws:
      JsonDataException - if the current JSON data is not a JSON array

    • asInt

      default int asInt() throws JsonDataException
      Returns an int value parsed from the current JSON data if the type of the current JSON data is JSON number.
      Returns:
      an int value parsed from the current JSON data if the type of the current JSON data is JSON number
      Throws:
      JsonDataException - if the current JSON data is not a JSON number

    • asLong

      default long asLong() throws JsonDataException
      Returns a long value parsed from the current JSON data if the type of the current JSON data is JSON number.
      Returns:
      a long value parsed from the current JSON data if the type of the current JSON data is JSON number
      Throws:
      JsonDataException - if the current JSON data is not a JSON number

      Returns a float value parsed from the current JSON data if the type of the current JSON data is JSON number.

    • asDataMap

      @Nonnull default @Nonnull DataMap asDataMap() throws JsonDataException
      Returns a DataMap with the ObjectConverter.defaultConverter() to wrap the asMap() if the type of the current JSON data is JSON object.
      Returns:
      a DataMap with the ObjectConverter.defaultConverter() to wrap the asMap() if the type of the current JSON data is JSON object
      Throws:

    • asDataList

      @Nonnull default @Nonnull DataList asDataList() throws JsonDataException
      Returns a DataList with the ObjectConverter.defaultConverter() to wrap the asList() if the type of the current JSON data is JSON array.

      a DataList with the ObjectConverter.defaultConverter() to wrap the asList() if the type of the current JSON data is JSON array
      Throws:

    • toObject

      @Nonnull default <T> T toObject(Class<T> cls) throws DataException
      Converts this JsonData to a new object of the specified class.

      This method supports JSON Object, JSON Array, JSON String, JSON Number, JSON Boolean, but not JSON Null.

      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of the object to be returned`
      Parameters:
      cls - the specified class
      Returns:
      a new object of the specified class
      Throws:
      DataException - if an error occurs during the conversion

    • toObject

      @Nonnull default <T> T toObject(TypeRef<T> typeRef) throws DataException
      Converts this JsonData to a new object of the specified class.

      This method supports JSON Object, JSON Array, JSON String, JSON Number, JSON Boolean, but not JSON Null.

      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of the object to be returned`
      Parameters:
      typeRef - the reference of the specified class
      Returns:
      a new object of the specified class
      Throws:
      DataException - if an error occurs during the conversion

    • toObject

      @Nonnull default @Nonnull Object toObject(Type type) throws DataException
      Converts this JsonData to a new object of the specified type.

      This method supports JSON Object, JSON Array, JSON String, JSON Number, JSON Boolean, but not JSON Null.

      Parameters:
      type - the specified type
      Returns:
      a new object of the specified type
      Throws:
      DataException - if an error occurs during the conversion

      Returns the JSON string of the current JSON data.
